name: tablo-vscode
description: VS Code support for the Tablo programming language.

program.description: Path to the compiled Tablo object file (.tbo) to debug.

sourceFile.description: Path to the Tablo source file (.tablo) to compile and debug.

cwd.description: Working directory used when launching the debugger.

tablocPath.description: Optional path to the tabloc executable. Defaults to `tabloc` on PATH.

tablodbgPath.description: Optional path to the tablodbg executable. Defaults to `tablodbg` on PATH.

projectConfigPath.description: Optional path to a `tablo.toml` file used for schema-aware compilation and runtime database configuration during debugging.

configurationSnippets.label: Tablo: Launch object file
configurationSnippets.description: Launch a compiled Tablo object file under tablodbg.

tablo.debug.tablocPath.description: Path to the `tabloc` executable used to compile `.tablo` files before debugging.

tablo.debug.tablodbgPath.description: Path to the `tablodbg` executable used for DAP debugging.

tablo.debug.projectConfigPath.description: Optional path to a `tablo.toml` file used by both `tabloc` and `tablodbg` during debugging.

tablo.debug.outputDirectory.description: Workspace-relative directory used for generated debug-time `.tbo` files.

tablo.language.enableLsp.description: Enable the experimental `tablolsp`-backed language features. When enabled, the built-in extension-side completion provider is disabled.

tablo.language.tablolspPath.description: Path to the `tablolsp` executable used for experimental LSP-based language features such as diagnostics.
